dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal KAUFMAN_DRY_15 is a same-day continuation strategy. Entry conditions compare the close of the first bar (represented as current close) against the previous close to determine direction. Exit is a reversal of the entry condition (opposite directional cross). Hold period is 1 day (intraday through end of day). Signal is context-dependent: if first bar closes higher, go long; if lower, go short.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal KAUFMAN_DRY_15 is a same-day continuation strategy. Entry conditions compare the close of the first bar (represented as current close) against the previous close to determine direction. Exit is a reversal of the entry condition (opposite directional cross). Hold period is 1 day (intraday through end of day). Signal is context-dependent: if first bar closes higher, go long; if lower, go short.

source_rule_text: If the first bar closes higher than the previous close, expect prices to continue higher throughout the day; if the first bar closes lower than the previous close, expect prices to continue lower throughout the day.
